subject: [COURSES] Social Sciences & Humanities Electives - Space Available!
body:
Dear Business Institutions students,

If you still need to fulfill your Social Sciences & Humanities Electives, there is currently space available in the following BUS_INST courses:

BUS_INST 321-0 - Business and Economic Institutions in Historical Perspective
Enrollment Requisites: ECON 201-0, ECON 202-0, STAT 210-0, MATH 218/220 (Calculus), or equivalents.
Meeting Time: Tuesdays & Thursdays, 9:30AM - 10:50AM
Instructor: Carola Frydman
Course Description<https://class-descriptions.northwestern.edu/5010/WCAS/BUS_INST/20695 >

BUS_INST 331-0 - Real Estate Finance & Investment
Enrollment Requisites: ECON 201-0, ECON 202-0, STAT 210-0, BUS_INST 304-0 (Corporate Finance), or equivalents.
Meeting Time: Tuesdays & Thursdays, 9:30AM - 10:50AM
Instructor: Craig Furfine
Course Description<https://class-descriptions.northwestern.edu/5010/WCAS/BUS_INST/20696 >


For those who have yet to complete all four Business Tools courses, there is space available in the following:

BUS_INST 301-0 - 20 - Accounting
Enrollment Requisites: Any combination of ECON 201/ECON 311/AP-IB Macro AND ECON 202/ECON 310/MMSS 211-1/AP-IB Micro credit is required to register for this course.
Meeting Time: Tuesdays & Thursdays, 11:00AM - 12:20PM
Instructor: Robin Soffer
Course Description<https://class-descriptions.northwestern.edu/5010/WCAS/BUS_INST/20681 >

BUS_INST 304-0 - 20 & 21 - Corporate Finance
Enrollment Requisites: ECON 201-0, ECON 202-0, STAT 210-0, MATH 218/220 (Calculus), BUS_INST 301 (Accounting), or equivalents.
Meeting Time (section 20): Mondays & Wednesdays, 3:30PM - 4:50PM
Meeting Time (section 21): Mondays & Wednesdays, 5:00PM - 6:20PM
Instructor: Maddalena Ronchi
Course Description<https://class-descriptions.northwestern.edu/5010/WCAS/BUS_INST >



When planning your schedule, please keep in mind the minor requirements<http://www.bip.northwestern.edu/undergraduate/minor-requirements/ >.

  *   Please keep in mind, you may NOT double-count Social Sciences & Humanities Electives with another major/minor/certificate. If applicable, Social Sciences & Humanities Electives could be used to fulfill Distribution<https://weinberg.northwestern.edu/undergraduate/degree/distribution-requirements/index.html >/ Foundational Disciplines<https://weinberg.northwestern.edu/undergraduate/degree/post-spring-2023-degree/foundational-disciplines/index.html >/ Theme<https://www.mccormick.northwestern.edu/academics/undergraduate/core-curriculum/social-science-humanities-theme-requirement.html > Requirements (Medill students must inquire with Medill for approval).
  *   If you are in doubt about a time or day for a class, refer to CAESAR or the department listing the class.
  *   There are no waitlists for BUS_INST courses. If a class closes, students are encouraged to check CAESAR periodically for an available seat.


----------
Natalia Zochowski
Program Assistant | Kapnick Center for Business Institutions | Northwestern University
2010 Sheridan Road, Evanston, IL 60208 | 847-491-2706
cbi.northwestern.edu<https://cbi.northwestern.edu/ > |Facebook<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.facebook.com/pages/Kapnick-Business-Institutions/253108394915__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VTm8FsL4OCbzMz_k-ws_GQ1WUhGf7xsni_45Ad6QQF_rCKnSCDtkpBzCCspNA7DJ50N3Mw695gWTbj3OAWu9BvuS-x4lzw$ > | LinkedIn<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.linkedin.com/groups/4487429__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VTm8FsL4OCbzMz_k-ws_GQ1WUhGf7xsni_45Ad6QQF_rCKnSCDtkpBzCCspNA7DJ50N3Mw695gWTbj3OAWu9Bvu80qRt9A$ > | Instagram<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.instagram.com/kapnickcenter/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VTm8FsL4OCbzMz_k-ws_GQ1WUhGf7xsni_45Ad6QQF_rCKnSCDtkpBzCCspNA7DJ50N3Mw695gWTbj3OAWu9BvsybaRevQ$ > | Listserv<https://listserv.it.northwestern.edu/scripts/wa.exe?SUBED1=BIP >

subject: Free IB/PE/MBA Bootcamp Giveaway for IMC Members
body:
Hi Everyone,

We’re partnering with Leland this winter and have the opportunity to give
away one free bootcamp seat (valued at ~$1,000) to an IMC member. What’s
included are recruiting bootcamps (IB, PE, consulting), deferred MBA app
support, and GMAT/GRE prep.

The suggested prize is the Investment Banking Recruiting Bootcamp
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.joinleland.com/bootcamps/investment-banking-recruiting-bootcamp__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VMejc6WN9kldkhmpxHekR3_YXd2uYxR_GTTdRk680352odmKiWq6yf6QUQHtg39XiR9uguw7KK4z9q9S5TOKa8jrc5WFt8BAKfE6c3Sur3uclg$ >
starting Jan 26, but the winner can redeem the seat for any upcoming Leland
bootcamp (including PE Recruiting starting Feb 3
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.joinleland.com/bootcamps/private-equity-recruiting-bootcamp__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VMejc6WN9kldkhmpxHekR3_YXd2uYxR_GTTdRk680352odmKiWq6yf6QUQHtg39XiR9uguw7KK4z9q9S5TOKa8jrc5WFt8BAKfE6c3RmnjFdlw$ >)
or a later 2026 cohort.

To unlock the giveaway, we need 35 unique entries. All non-winners will
still receive exclusive partner scholarships. The giveaway closes on
December 28th and the winner will be notified on December 29th.

*Enter here
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://joinleland.typeform.com/to/Aovq8jUL?school=Northwestern*20University&club=Investment*20Management*20Club&bootcamp_category=IB*20Recruiting&school_abbreviation=NU&club_abbreviation=IMC&bootcamp_slug=investment-banking-recruiting-bootcamp__;JSUlJQ!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VMejc6WN9kldkhmpxHekR3_YXd2uYxR_GTTdRk680352odmKiWq6yf6QUQHtg39XiR9uguw7KK4z9q9S5TOKa8jrc5WFt8BAKfE6c3QbtisGEQ$ >*


Please sign up if interested and feel free to share with other IMC members
so we hit the minimum.

Best,
IMC Exec

subject: [POSTING] Dec 2025 Grads: FP&A Analyst with Strategy

Strategy<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://lnkd.in/gBq4jc9v__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!WlzAqHeXHMmpwyMaWN5VpxkyJ8KJBrXo3ENryEwIrPAylel7pQliyjJ7tYcl07XV74IthBu9uk3Tgi5c-z0T5Z9nMuLRfQ$ >, a Bitcoin treasury and software company, is hiring a Junior or Senior FP&A Analyst based in Tysons, VA to start immediately. They are looking for a Northwestern grad with 0-5 years of experience to apply! Learn more and apply for the role here<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://jobs.smartrecruiters.com/MicroStrategy1/744000085214025-senior-financial-procurement-analyst__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!WlzAqHeXHMmpwyMaWN5VpxkyJ8KJBrXo3ENryEwIrPAylel7pQliyjJ7tYcl07XV74IthBu9uk3Tgi5c-z0T5Z8kbfhnHA$ >.

subject: It's that time of year again
body:
Dear Favorite Business Institutions Students –

December has arrived!
#1 Best wishes on finals, papers and projects. Remember, finals week can be stressful, if needed, please reach out.  You are a part of the Kapnick Center community and we care about you.
#2 Joyful holiday wishes for you and your family.  Travel safely.
#3 Cheers to a new year that brings good health and happiness.
You worked hard this quarter and we are proud. We wish you all the best.
Bill, Natalia, Meg and Patty

subject: [EVENT] Chicago Advertising Federation Tickets
body:
Free Ticket to Chicago Advertising Federation Career Day
Feb 6, 8 AM - 4:30 PM
Northwestern Career Advancement purchased a block of tickets for the Chicago Advertising Federation Career Day. Request a ticket<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd1ToZec5J8tt8xyk3nM156Qae3EjviMsdSiv7XHRqzpQraBg/viewform__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VqNcUnMOnq_VzWCJpSGNapfau4xtIhATIZ08rqACUEkT1a51tNmf28OGNEwlSkvZ43I2og12vmFPECZlqzukaOP-dWkLfg$ >, and we will follow up separately with confirmation. Tickets will be given on a first come first serve basis.

Description: Career Day 2026 is coming up on February 6th, 2026 at the UIC Forum. This is a chance for students and recent grads to gain real-world insights into advertising and marketing careers, from brands, agencies, and tech/industry-related professionals, brought to you by the Chicago Advertising Federation.
Learn more<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://chicagoadfed.glueup.com/event/caf-career-day-151189/?lor=16&utm_source=mass_mailer&utm_medium=email&utm_content=1898675&utm_campaign=uni_targeted_emails__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VqNcUnMOnq_VzWCJpSGNapfau4xtIhATIZ08rqACUEkT1a51tNmf28OGNEwlSkvZ43I2og12vmFPECZlqzukaOPsWlEuNg$ >

subject: ⚡️WiC  Bits: 11/18/25
body:
<https://wic.northwestern.edu/ >


Announcements at a Glance
 We know you're busy, so here are the highlights:


1. Mid-Week Boba Boost*


2. SpartaHack 11


3. Open Opportunities at Jane Street
*denotes a WiC Event

*WiC Resume Book Update*







Thank you to everyone who submitted to the WiC Resume Book! Resumes
received before November 17th have now been shared with our corporate
sponsors. We appreciate your participation, and we’re wishing you all the
best as opportunities come your way!

*WiC x Moge: Mid(ish)-Week Boba Boost*







Need a mid-week boost? Grab a sweet treat with us to power through your
afternoon! WiC is hosting a mid-week boba social at Moge Tee this Thursday,
September 20th at 2:00 PM. We’re heading to Moge Tee for some mid-day boba
and a dose of WiC-energy to get you through the rest of the week. Come hang
out, sip something sweet, and unwind with the WiC community.


📍 Location: Moge Tee Evanston
🧋 Time: Starting at 2:00 PM (come and go as you wish)


RSVP for the event HERE
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScmB5-wMWGIP83Jb1451kRJyfaUxdXHHw1Z5vUdElJHFvir2Q/viewform__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39n6Kwyd0g$ >
!


­
What’s Happening On Campus

*CS Study Abroad Info Session - Today at 5:30pm*






There is an online info session today (Nov 18) at 5:30 PM Central that
covers everything you need to know about studying abroad, especially how it
fits with CS requirements. You’ll hear from the NU Global Learning Office
and students who’ve gone abroad before, plus get a sneak peek at CS
policies and planning tips.


📅 Tuesday, Nov 18
⏰ 5:30 PM CT
🔗 Zoom Link HERE <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://northwestern.zoom.us/j/99554770923?jst=2__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39k0Jd1ZzA$ >
📘 Preview information HERE
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://cs-nu.github.io/nu-cs-study-abroad/NU-CS-study-abroad-policy.pdf__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39kirAwCzQ$ >


If study abroad is on your radar at all, this is a great session to join!


­
Other Opportunities


*SpartaHack 11 *🚀




Looking for a fun way to kick off winter quarter? Michigan State University
is hosting SpartaHack 11 from January 31–February 1, and all experience
levels are welcome! They offer mentorship, workshops, and even travel
reimbursements, so this could be a great chance to build something cool
over a weekend.


📍 East Lansing, MI
🗓️ Jan 31 – Feb 1
🌐 Apply to the hackathon HERE <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.spartahack.com/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39md8-39yw$ >


If you’re interested in hackathons (or want to try one for the first time),
definitely check it out!


*Jane Street 2026 GRF Applications Open!*


Jane Street’s 2026 Graduate Research Fellowship is closing applications
next week! The fellowship supports exceptional doctoral students across
these fields, and there’s still time to apply. Jane Street’s GRF supports
exceptional doctoral students in electrical engineering, computer science,
mathematics, physics, and statistics. Interested students can APPLY HERE
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/apply-graduate-research-fellowship/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39niP8Nwtg$ > and learn
more about the program on our website
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/programs-and-events/graduate-research-fellowship/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39m3ndytVg$ >
.


If you or someone you know fits the criteria, definitely check it out!


*Jane Street AMP 2026 – TA Summer Positions*

Jane Street is offering paid summer Teaching Assistant positions for their
2026 Academy of Math & Programming (AMP)
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/programs-and-events/amp/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39mP7qXcwA$ >, a
five-week academic program in NYC for recent high school graduates
interested in math and computer science. TAs will support classes, lead
problem-solving and activities, and mentor students throughout the program.
Travel, housing, and meals are included, with competitive compensation.
Open to current undergraduate and graduate students. Applications are
reviewed on a rolling basis, so apply early.



AMP 2026: Teaching Assistants, Computer Science
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/position/8213677002/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39nQ4t7DqQ$ >
AMP 2026: Teaching Assistants, Mathematics
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/position/8213652002/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39k_S8Xf5A$ >


Questions: academy@janestreet.com
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://us17.admin.mailchimp.com/campaigns/preview-content-html?id=13883859&e=default__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39kdY1TZKA$ >

*Summer 2026 Tech Internship Opportunities*

Looking for a tech internship for Summer 2026? This crowdsourced GitHub
repo  <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://github.com/vanshb03/Summer2026-Internships__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39kH8ttUVQ$ >compiles a
regularly updated list of internship opportunities in software engineering,
data science, and related fields. A great resource to find and track open
positions!


*Other Resources:*

*WiC Alumni Database*
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__http://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1iM1dULj3JIWcUlT5N_j1tXoU1ijYXph1JeNslt5zsMw/edit*gid=0__;Iw!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39kLwX3mXQ$ >

Northwestern Alumni Database & Northwestern Network Mentorship Program
<http://mentor.northwestern.edu/ >

Join a course specific Slack Channel
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1uRLNdxU_LvaIbKDbSIJlz5GJK79Nuea-JsauzMlYwgw/edit*gid=0__;Iw!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39mPVuWTYQ$ >

Give us feedback or ask us questions
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfOJ2c3m6w3WgZSMTHcDRRwgvZgCRXbESsd1wXnzRhdLtHBTg/viewform__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39kwV-49sQ$ >



*Stay in touch with WiC!*
Be sure to follow our Instagram @wic.northwestern
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.instagram.com/wic.northwestern/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39k6LLEIxA$ >and LinkedIn
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.linkedin.com/company/northwestern-women-in-computing/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39l8I2tYtA$ >, join
our Slack
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://join.slack.com/t/nu-wic/shared_invite/zt-pwr2sqgn-ireqQOiFD8l_0Yw7FeqURA__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39mD8EywBA$ >
for
more updates, and join our Google Calendar
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/8?cid=d2ljQHUubm9ydGh3ZXN0ZXJuLmVkdQ__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VIElqxGmZYukiwu29OsRAGlpFx2fcfG4FcSFr1KwG5nclKV_I_UmSTNqdrYztogDUba0GaH1xm2-l9Bc9knahYv8XKvc39mUXZjK-g$ >
to
keep up with events!  💖

subject: DEC. 4 @Noon: Discover Taiwan '26 Info Session
body:
________________________________


Join us for an info session on Zoom @ noon on Thursday, Dec. 4 about Discover Taiwan 2026, a short-term, highly subsidized study abroad program to Taiwan in June 2026!

RSVP HERE<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://northwestern.zoom.us/meeting/register/jtwsdcYUSSWSR80uUlGGFg__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!TT8DH7tgUhsUtBttnZbwCeswktHWcLa1iRdzaYmLRTFxTC0mbgPMn2Q7wzxiJfSqfSHSlNElj0bMAXPkeWmVbv5yvI-OCuc6DWJU-dtTrqNxrrbx$ > or use the link/QR code in the attached.

Watch THIS VIDEO<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nw2bi2QtVkY__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!TT8DH7tgUhsUtBttnZbwCeswktHWcLa1iRdzaYmLRTFxTC0mbgPMn2Q7wzxiJfSqfSHSlNElj0bMAXPkeWmVbv5yvI-OCuc6DWJU-dtTrm85leIb$ > for a first look at this exciting opportunity!

You can also find the same information (and more about study abroad) at the Chinese study abroad page<https://alc.northwestern.edu/areas-of-study/chinese/study-abroad.html > of the Dept. of Asian Languages & Cultures<https://alc.northwestern.edu/ > (ALC) website, including the videos about the 2023 and 2024 Discover Taiwan trips!

As indicated in the flyer, you need to be a sophomore or junior to apply, in addition to meeting ONE of the follow requirements: Enrolled in one Winter 2026 Chinese course OR being a current ALC major/minor focusing on the Chinese language.

If you are a freshman, you are still encouraged to attend this event as we'll most likely run this program again in 2027. If you are already a senior, please share this information with those you think are eligible but could be left out in this email.

Let me know if you have any questions!

Best,

Wen-pin Hsieh, Ph.D.
Associate Professor of Instruction
Dept. of Asian Languages and Cultures, Northwestern University
847-467-4792, 1880 Campus Drive, Kresge Hall, Office 4-536
wen-pin.hsieh@northwestern.edu
https://alc.northwestern.edu/people/faculty/hsieh-wen-pin.html

________________________________
From: Yan Zhou <yan.zhou@northwestern.edu>
Sent: Monday, November 17, 2025 11:35 AM
To: Chinese language program listserv <chineselang@listserv.it.northwestern.edu>
Subject: Chinese Philosophy & Boba 11/19 4:30pm @ Kresge 2425—Chinese Philosophy in Everyday Life

Dear Students,

You are kindly invited to: Chinese Philosophy in Everyday Life

WHEN: Wednesday, November 19 at 4:30PM-5:30PM

WHERE: Kresge Centennial Hall 2425

RSVP: https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://forms.gle/3Uh9sdycGrVeKXZcA__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VvcHQkKQeU9dGd47KN4rZgaJcI4puxgaHtNWWZeB5aHve66aSP99FPzIbaHUcq9_xgBLAEarvGMyefHYUitBBUekZCpm9beLmHGEfG0NAQ$ 

In this special session, Dr. Wenhui Xie, a scholar of Chinese philosophy from Peking University, will guide us through the everyday relevance of classical Chinese thought. We’ll explore how Chinese traditional thoughts shape daily life, relationships, and decision-making, and how they contrast with Western philosophical frameworks. Whether you're curious about cultural perspectives or simply love a good cup of boba, this is a conversation you won’t want to miss!

Dr. Xie will join us remotely. Boba will be provided while supplies last!!

This event is sponsored by Buffet Institute Glolal Collaborataion Grants.

Best,


Yan Zhou (pronounced like Englishâ€œJoeâ€?), Ph.D.

Assistant Professor of Instruction

Department of Asian Languages and Cultures, Northwestern University

subject: ⚡️WiC  Bits: 11/27/25
body:
<https://wic.northwestern.edu/ >


Announcements at a Glance
 We know you're busy, so here are the highlights:


1. DISC Discover Program


2. IEEE Technical Program


3. BoilerMake & SpartaHacks Applications Open
*denotes a WiC Event


­
What’s Happening On Campus


*🌐 DISC Discover Program Applications Open*








Looking to build a real-world project that will boost your resume while
making an impact on your local community? Apply to the Discover Program for
Winter and Spring! DISC pairs student developers with local organizations
to develop industry-grade web applications. Over two quarters, you’ll work
in a team of 5–6 students and build a project from its initial design to
final deployment. Gain hands-on experience while forming connections with
mentors and fellow developers!


DISC is recruiting for a variety of roles. Visit their website
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.discnu.org/discover-program/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_cIU_cYwA$ > for full application, role, and
project details. *Applications are due January 3, 2026 at 11:59 PM.*


*IEEE Project Engineer Applications are Now Open!*









Project Engineer applications for the 2026 Technical Program are now open!
IEEE is looking for people with strong commitment and willingness to learn
to bring awesome ideas to life. You will get to work on real, impactful
projects, grow industry-desired skills and gain mentorship and guidance.


The application is on a rolling basis, with a final deadline on Monday,
01/05/26. Please apply HERE
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdvXnxoYzplLcGOfICqWL7Skf-PkoBj7n769i4sLVRw-324ww/viewform__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_feHrV-eQ$ >.
To review information about the Technical Program, please refer to this
document
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yeu_Ax8z9bEP0pr-_F_Z2fuqg6X3KFjJnjAKipEFsSc/edit?tab=t.0*heading=h.f8nasqp9f8up__;Iw!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_f7HLH1gA$ >
.


While members are free to apply to both DISC Discover and IEEE Technical
Program, keep in mind that you should only commit to one of the programs.
If you are accepted by both programs, you will have a few days to decide
which program to commit to.


­
Other Opportunities


*SpartaHack 11 *🚀




Looking for a fun way to kick off winter quarter? Michigan State University
is hosting SpartaHack 11 from January 31–February 1, and all experience
levels are welcome! They offer mentorship, workshops, and even travel
reimbursements, so this could be a great chance to build something cool
over a weekend.


📍 East Lansing, MI
🗓️ Jan 31 – Feb 1
🌐 Apply to the hackathon HERE <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.spartahack.com/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_c4E_b6hQ$ >


If you’re interested in hackathons (or want to try one for the first time),
definitely check it out!



*🚀 BoilerMake 2026 Applications Now Open*



BoilerMake, one of the Midwest’s largest collegiate hackathons, will take
place January 23–25, 2026 at Purdue University’s West Lafayette campus. The
event brings together more than 500 students for 36 hours of building
innovative software and hardware projects, attending workshops and tech
talks, and connecting with sponsoring companies and mentors.


Participation is completely free, with meals, snacks, and exclusive swag
provided throughout the weekend. Students of all majors and experience
levels are encouraged to apply. Whether you’re an experienced hacker or
brand-new to programming, BoilerMake offers an engaging, supportive space
to learn, create, and collaborate.


For questions, contact *team@boilermake.org* or visit *@boilermake* on
Instagram. Applications are now open. Apply HERE <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://boilermake.org/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_fp8S47PA$ >
 today!


*Jane Street AMP 2026 – TA Summer Positions*

Jane Street is offering paid summer Teaching Assistant positions for their
2026 Academy of Math & Programming (AMP)
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/programs-and-events/amp/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_c1RdbZ1w$ >, a
five-week academic program in NYC for recent high school graduates
interested in math and computer science. TAs will support classes, lead
problem-solving and activities, and mentor students throughout the program.
Travel, housing, and meals are included, with competitive compensation.
Open to current undergraduate and graduate students. Applications are
reviewed on a rolling basis, so apply early.



AMP 2026: Teaching Assistants, Computer Science
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/position/8213677002/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_fmdsjqXQ$ >
AMP 2026: Teaching Assistants, Mathematics
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.janestreet.com/join-jane-street/position/8213652002/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_fvvYVFKQ$ >


Questions: academy@janestreet.com
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://us17.admin.mailchimp.com/campaigns/preview-content-html?id=13883895&e=default__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_crJKbIug$ >

*Summer 2026 Tech Internship Opportunities*

Looking for a tech internship for Summer 2026? This crowdsourced GitHub
repo  <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://github.com/vanshb03/Summer2026-Internships__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_fZoyCEgw$ >compiles a
regularly updated list of internship opportunities in software engineering,
data science, and related fields. A great resource to find and track open
positions!


*Other Resources:*

*WiC Alumni Database*
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__http://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1iM1dULj3JIWcUlT5N_j1tXoU1ijYXph1JeNslt5zsMw/edit*gid=0__;Iw!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_dtVUGLbA$ >

Northwestern Alumni Database & Northwestern Network Mentorship Program
<http://mentor.northwestern.edu/ >

Join a course specific Slack Channel
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1uRLNdxU_LvaIbKDbSIJlz5GJK79Nuea-JsauzMlYwgw/edit*gid=0__;Iw!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_eV5HjRqA$ >

Give us feedback or ask us questions
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfOJ2c3m6w3WgZSMTHcDRRwgvZgCRXbESsd1wXnzRhdLtHBTg/viewform__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_di36u7SA$ >



*Stay in touch with WiC!*
Be sure to follow our Instagram @wic.northwestern
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.instagram.com/wic.northwestern/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_e71Znfpg$ >and LinkedIn
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.linkedin.com/company/northwestern-women-in-computing/__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_cvsnWXSQ$ >, join
our Slack
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://join.slack.com/t/nu-wic/shared_invite/zt-pwr2sqgn-ireqQOiFD8l_0Yw7FeqURA__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!SdY6FHxROu6moWHrs3VoEuLzRzvaYClZXhhKZ5XZTwMdmjoIm1SbYsUX7lEZWSZ_ZfFeFnYxqzkevODPEOlf18dUefFfa_deaGqTNA$ >
for
more updates, and join our Google Calendar

subject: Fwd: AI Research Opportunity for Institute For Student Business Education Members
body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Director @ VAI <director@veritasai.com>
Date: Mon, Nov 17, 2025 at 8:20 AM
Subject: AI Research Opportunity for Institute For Student Business
Education Members
To: <nuisbe@gmail.com>


Hi Beatrice,

This is Tyler, director of Veritas AI – an AI research program founded by
Harvard graduate students.

I came across Institute For Student Business Education and think your
members would be a great fit for our AI Research Fellowship, where students
work 1-1 with AI researchers from universities to conduct original ML/AI
projects. Over 1000+ students have built research projects from scratch
with us.

*Would you be willing to share this research opportunity below with your
members? The application deadline is November 30, 2025.* Here
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://veritasai.mxmagnoilia.com/63d8be5a6a8e81296572d38c/l/uGY10viDljx4XqxTQ?rn=&re=i02bj5CbpFWbnBUZiNXa15mI&sc=false__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VaTyrpwg8tqn3etFF9mnY6hDbuw0bL7LHwvhGCSO5ZIyc0IYiPNaXGktxbqNQCTVBVcWX2R54e0MjVWU_GsWEtMiAoipWQ$ >
is more program info and the application form
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://veritasai.mxmagnoilia.com/63d8be5a6a8e81296572d38c/l/b3sypvSvTmlnt248C?rn=&re=i02bj5CbpFWbnBUZiNXa15mI&sc=false__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VaTyrpwg8tqn3etFF9mnY6hDbuw0bL7LHwvhGCSO5ZIyc0IYiPNaXGktxbqNQCTVBVcWX2R54e0MjVWU_GsWEtO3pzzK9A$ >
.

Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Yours,
Tyler Moulton

*Blurb to share*
*AI Research Opportunity | Harvard Researchers *
*Founded by Harvard researchers,* Veritas AI
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://veritasai.mxmagnoilia.com/63d8be5a6a8e81296572d38c/l/BXDbQJ3OJKP89s4wD?rn=&re=i02bj5CbpFWbnBUZiNXa15mI&sc=false__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VaTyrpwg8tqn3etFF9mnY6hDbuw0bL7LHwvhGCSO5ZIyc0IYiPNaXGktxbqNQCTVBVcWX2R54e0MjVWU_GsWEtN9ciKmvg$ >
is
a selective research program for ambitious university students looking to
get a head start in AI research. In the AI Research Fellowship program,
students work to conduct original research in ML/AI to target AI
conferences and journals such as NeurIPS, ACL, NAACL. The program is
selective and financial aid is available for students with financial need.
The deadline is November 30. Past students have published papers, presented
at conferences, and built impressive portfolios.
*Application deadline: November 30, 2025. *

Here
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://veritasai.mxmagnoilia.com/63d8be5a6a8e81296572d38c/l/zRE1kxjcvJDlaigdT?rn=&re=i02bj5CbpFWbnBUZiNXa15mI&sc=false__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VaTyrpwg8tqn3etFF9mnY6hDbuw0bL7LHwvhGCSO5ZIyc0IYiPNaXGktxbqNQCTVBVcWX2R54e0MjVWU_GsWEtMoboTJQA$ >
is the program website, and you can apply here
<https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://veritasai.mxmagnoilia.com/63d8be5a6a8e81296572d38c/l/D6iuEm4Gh3975wUi1?rn=&re=i02bj5CbpFWbnBUZiNXa15mI&sc=false__;!!Dq0X2DkFhyF93HkjWTBQKhk!VaTyrpwg8tqn3etFF9mnY6hDbuw0bL7LHwvhGCSO5ZIyc0IYiPNaXGktxbqNQCTVBVcWX2R54e0MjVWU_GsWEtMqNViErA$ >
.
